message:
The other day, our family group chat was buzzing about preparing for road trips. You know how it is—everyone has their own ideas about what to pack and how to stay safe on the road. It got me thinking about how important it is to have a plan, especially when traveling. I came across a really helpful resource that covers what you might need in your car for emergencies.

It’s all about keeping things calm and organized so you can focus on making memories instead of worrying about what-ifs. A little preparation can go a long way, don't you think?
